message:
Fix materialize_input to reject directory paths with is_file guard

Previously materialize_input_with_token only checked path.exists(),
which allowed directory paths to pass validation since directories
satisfy the existence check. This caused downstream failures when
the audio pipeline attempted to read a directory as a file.

Add an explicit path.is_file() check after the existence check,
returning an InvalidRequest error with a clear "not a file" message
when the input path is a directory or other non-file entity.

Update the corresponding test from
materialize_file_directory_path_succeeds_because_exists_is_true to
materialize_file_directory_path_returns_error, asserting that
directory paths are now correctly rejected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
